items.title: Record-breaking Ecclestone helps England dismiss India for 285 at Lord's
items.summary: Sophie Ecclestone became England Women's leading wicket-taker across all formats as the hosts dismissed India for 285 on a see-saw opening day of the historic first women's Test at Lord's.

items.summary: MAN UTD are reportedly looking at adding another midfielder to their ranks. Michael Carrick's side are set for a double swoop for Brazilian midfielder Ederson and Chelsea's Andrey Santos. items.title: Why does Erling Haaland have Braut on his shirt for Norway at the World Cup?
items.summary: ERLING Haaland has been incredibly prolific during his first World Cup, but as the goals have been flying in fans have been noticing something unusual about his shirt. items.title: Carra: Why I'd pick Kane over 'greatest goalscorer' Haaland
items.summary: Jamie Carragher says Erling Haaland will go down as "the greatest goalscorer of all time" - but he'd rather have Harry Kane in his team.

items.title: Hacking worry for Argentine FA over World Cup emails
items.summary: Argentina's football association signals it may have suffered a cyber attack after emails from its accounts reportedly criticised refereeing in the dramatic win against Egypt at the World Cup.

items.title: Aberdeen sell Keskinen to Odense after 'very good offer'
items.summary: Aberdeen sell Topi Keskinen to Odense for an undisclosed fee, which Pittodrie manager Stephen Robinson describes as "a very good offer".

items.title: Podcast: From relegation fears to top-six dreams - Kilmarnock's season preview
items.summary: Optimism is back at Rugby Park under Neil McCann.

items.title: Man City sign Charles from Chelsea
items.summary: Manchester City have signed Niamh Charles from Chelsea on a three-year deal.

items.title: England defender Charles joins Man City from Chelsea
items.summary: Manchester City have signed England international Niamh Charles for £500,000 from Women's Super League rivals Chelsea.

items.title: Burnley appoint Hayen as new head coach
items.summary: Burnley appoint Genk boss Nicky Hayen as their new head coach on a three-year deal.
